productDisplayName: Puma Men Racer Bright Green Sports Shoes
description: Epitomising lightweight running, the puma L.I.F.T. Racer Bright Chartreuse running shoe combines an innovative design in a low profile silhouette, creating a fabulously lightweight trainer. The Light Injected Foam Technology, which is what gives the shoe its name, is engineered using an EVA injection process that allows the EVA to wrap around the entire foot and aids easy short distance running, while it's versatile design makes it a fab everyday wear. Upper Microsuede trim and oval mesh upper for lightweight, breathable comfort Synthetic and suede overlays with cut-outs for breathability and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for a comfortable wear Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole EVA outsole with suction lugs strategically placed for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
